name: hebrew-date-utils-monorepo
description: Monorepo for hebrew-date-utils core package, React date picker, and official docs site

scripts.build: pnpm --filter hebrew-date-utils build && pnpm --filter hebrew-date-picker-react build && pnpm --filter @hebrew-date-utils/docs build
scripts.dev:docs: pnpm build:core && pnpm build:react-picker && pnpm --filter @hebrew-date-utils/docs dev
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter hebrew-date-utils typecheck && pnpm --filter hebrew-date-picker-react typecheck && pnpm --filter @hebrew-date-utils/docs typecheck
